## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No subscription URLs, node credentials, private domains, or secrets are included.
- [ ] Imported profile YAML semantics remain unchanged unless this PR explicitly documents otherwise.
- [ ] Helper, XPC, signing, entitlement, or Network Extension changes include release-appropriate verification notes.
